headline: Is AES (AES) Still Attractively Priced After Its Strong 1 Year Share Price Run?
summary: If you have been wondering whether AES at around US$14.39 is still attractively priced or already reflecting most of its potential, the valuation picture is the key place to focus. The stock has returned 0.6% over the last 7 days and 1.1% over the last 30 days, with a 47.7% return over 1 year contrasting with a 2.9% year to date decline and weaker 3 year and 5 year figures. Recent attention on AES has centered on its role in the utilities sector and how investors view its long term...

headline: AES Safety Setbacks Raise Questions Around Project Risk And Valuation
summary: Tennessee regulators issued a record safety fine to NYSE:AES for fatal violations at its McEwen power plant. The company is also cancelling a large battery energy storage project in San Diego County after community pushback and safety concerns. These developments focus attention on AES’s safety practices, project execution, and relationship with regulators and local communities. NYSE:AES operates in power generation and energy infrastructure, including renewables and grid scale storage...
